purpose: First real benchmark execution should be exactly one C0 EN-monolingual smoke episode before any baselines or mixed-language conditions. The active benchmark model is OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17; config/smoke_model.json remains smoke-only bring-up evidence.

preconditions.why: Smoke execution must call the local NegotiationArena checkout rather than a synthetic local loop.
Benchmark agents now use the explicit OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17 benchmark model. Smoke-only OpenAI evidence remains separately labeled.
Allowed only when config/smoke_model.json provider is openai; OpenAI smoke results are runner bring-up evidence only and must not be reported as Qwen3-1.7B research-matrix evidence.
Smoke output must be parseable before the setting advances to C0/C1 baselines.
Smoke output must produce deal, turn, anchoring, and payoff-asymmetry null-state metrics.

success_criteria: A transcript JSON exists at the expected path.
Every agent message is English-only by assignment metadata.
At least one OFFER line is parsed by scripts/offer_parser.py.
The metrics artifact reports offer_parse_rate for structured negotiation actions.
No C1, C2, or C3 episode is run in the same smoke command.

blocked_state.current_reason: Resolved for Qwen/local execution: local NegotiationArena checkout exists and the cached local Qwen3-1.7B Transformers provider passes a live generation probe.
blocked_state.do_not_mark_goal_complete_until: The expected transcript and metrics artifacts exist from a real local NegotiationArena run.
